Title: Login Event - User Authentication
Preconditions:
- Valid user account
- DevTools Console open
Steps:
1. Navigate to sign-in page
2. Enter valid credentials
3. Sign in
4. Check dataLayer in console
Expected Result:
- gtm.load event triggered
- user_id set in GA config
- currency and language included

Title: view_item_list - Category Page
Preconditions:
- User logged in
- DevTools Console open
Steps:
1. Navigate to category: /snacks
2. Wait for page load
3. Execute: dataLayer.filter(e => e[1] === 'view_item_list')
Expected Result:
- Event: view_item_list
- item_list_id present
- item_list_name with category
- items_skus (CSV of SKUs)
- items_count matches visible

Title: view_item - Product Detail Page
Steps:
1. Navigate to product page
2. Wait for load
3. Check dataLayer for view_item
Expected Result:
- Event: view_item
- currency: USD
- value: product price
- items[0] with item_id, item_name, price
- item_category hierarchy

Title: select_item - Product Click from List
Steps:
1. Navigate to category
2. Click on product title
3. Check dataLayer before navigation
Expected Result:
- Event: select_item
- item_list_id present
- item_list_name present
- items array with product details

Title: add_to_cart - Add Product
Preconditions:
- User on product page
- DevTools open
Steps:
1. Navigate to product page
2. Click 'Add to Cart'
3. Check dataLayer
Expected Result:
- Event: add_to_cart
- source_route: current page URL
- currency: USD
- value: product price
- items array with product

Title: view_cart - Cart Page Load
Steps:
1. Navigate to /cart
2. Wait for load
3. Check dataLayer
Expected Result:
- Event: view_cart
- currency: USD
- value: cart total
- items array with all cart items
- items_count matches

Title: update_cart_item - Quantity Change
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Increase quantity of item
3. Check dataLayer
Expected Result:
- Event: update_cart_item
- item_id: product SKU
- new_quantity: updated value
- previous_quantity: old value

Title: remove_from_cart - Remove Item
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Remove an item
3. Check dataLayer
Expected Result:
- Event: remove_from_cart
- currency: USD
- value: removed item value
- items array with removed item

Title: clear_cart - Clear All Items
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. Click 'Clear Cart'
3. Confirm
4. Check dataLayer
Expected Result:
- Event: clear_cart
- currency: USD
- value: 0
- items: empty array
- items_count: 0

Title: begin_checkout - Start Checkout
Preconditions:
- Products in cart
- On cart page
Steps:
1. Navigate to cart
2. dataLayer captured on load
3. Verify begin_checkout event
Expected Result:
- Event: begin_checkout
- currency: USD
- value: cart total
- items array with all items
- items_count correct

Title: add_shipping_info - Ground Shipping
Steps:
1. Select 'Ground' shipping
2. Check dataLayer
Expected Result:
- Event: add_shipping_info
- shipping_tier: Ground
- currency: USD
- value: 150 (shipping cost)
- items array

Title: add_shipping_info - Pickup (Zero Cost)
Steps:
1. Select 'Pickup' option
2. Check dataLayer
Expected Result:
- Event: add_shipping_info
- shipping_tier: Pickup
- value: 0 (no shipping cost)
BUG FIXED: Was showing 150

Title: add_shipping_info - Switch Methods
Steps:
1. Select Ground (verify value: 150)
2. Switch to Pickup (verify value: 0)
3. Switch back to Ground (verify value: 150)
Expected Result:
- Each change fires event
- Values correct for each method
- No stale values

Title: add_payment_info - Payment Selected
Steps:
1. Click payment dropdown
2. Select 'Bank card (Datatrans)'
3. Check dataLayer
Expected Result:
- Event: add_payment_info
- payment_type: DatatransPaymentMethod
- currency: USD
- value: order total
- items array

Title: place_order - Order Submission
Steps:
1. Click 'Place Order'
2. Check dataLayer before redirect
Expected Result:
- Event: place_order
- currency: USD
- value: order total
- items array (may include gifts)

Title: purchase - Payment Complete
Preconditions:
- Order with 'Payment Required' status
- Authorize.Net test card ready
Steps:
1. Navigate to order
2. Click 'Pay Now'
3. Enter payment details
4. Submit payment
5. Check dataLayer
Expected Result:
- Event: purchase
- currency: USD
- value: order total
- shipping: shipping cost
- tax: tax amount
- items array

Title: view_search_results - Search Results
Steps:
1. Search for 'laptop'
2. Wait for results page
3. Check dataLayer
Expected Result:
- Event: view_search_results
- search_term: laptop
- results_count: total results
- results_page: 1
- visible_items: CSV of SKUs

Title: add_to_wishlist - Add to List
Preconditions:
- User on product page
- Wishlist/list exists
Steps:
1. Click 'Add to List' button
2. Select a list
3. Click 'Save'
4. Check dataLayer
Expected Result:
- Event: add_to_wishlist
- currency: USD
- value: product price
- items array with product

Title: GA Config - Currency Setting
Steps:
1. Check dataLayer for config event
2. Verify currency parameter
Expected Result:
- currency: USD
- Matches store currency

Title: GA Config - Language Setting
Steps:
1. Check dataLayer for config event
2. Verify language parameter
Expected Result:
- language: en-US (or current)
- Matches user language

Title: GA Config - User ID
Steps:
1. Check dataLayer
2. Find user_id in config
Expected Result:
- user_id present
- UUID format
- Matches logged in user

Title: Event Items - Product Structure
Steps:
1. Trigger view_item event
2. Inspect items[0] structure
Expected Result:
- item_id: SKU
- item_name: product name
- price: number
- quantity: number
- item_category hierarchy (up to 5 levels)
- affiliation: vendor name

Title: Event Timing - Page Load Events
Steps:
1. Navigate to category
2. Verify view_item_list fires on load
Expected Result:
- Event fires after page load
- Not too early (data available)
- Not too late (user engaged)

Title: Event Persistence - Multiple Actions
Steps:
1. Perform: search, view category, view product, add to cart
2. Verify all events in dataLayer
Expected Result:
- All events captured
- Correct sequence
- No duplicates
- Data accurate
